title: 读红小札 | 红楼梦里那个最叛逆悲哀的少年：贾瑞 | 原文
content: Jia Rui, from *Dream of the Red Chamber*, is analyzed as a rebellious, tragic figure shaped by oppressive upbringing. His grandfather, strict teacher Jia Dairu, imposes rigid discipline while offering no affection. Despite his respectable family background, Jia Rui lacks parental love, as his parents died early. The essay reframes him beyond a mere lecher, arguing his moral collapse stems from emotional deprivation. The commentary centers on educational failure rather than romantic scandal, urging parental reflection.

title: What’s Next for Consumer AI? | Josh Elman Joins a16z
content: a16z's Anish Acharya interviews Josh Elman about his move to the venture firm and the future of consumer AI. Elman, who shaped products at LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, Apple and others, discusses how technology evolved from niche to mainstream. They explore how AI could spark a new generation of consumer products, changing discovery and distribution. Elman shares insights on retention, network effects, product-market fit and underexplored opportunities in consumer tech.

title: 押注 DeepSeek，再次出发做 Agent
content: The author developed Orca, a Rust-based terminal coding agent natively built for DeepSeek. After creating previous agents for Claude and GPT, they wanted a dedicated DeepSeek tool despite existing alternatives. Orca features a multi-round agent loop with SSE streaming, 1M context auto-compression, tiered approval with inline diffs, persistent goal mode for autonomous long tasks, subagents, session history, workflows, and verification gates. The author chose DeepSeek for its advancing capabilities, low cost, and early ecosystem. Orca aims to expand from coding to a general work agent, with a modular architecture supporting MCP tools and hooks for external integration.

title: 腾讯买出了AI半壁江山
content: Tencent is aggressively building an AI empire through strategic investments, deploying billions across China's AI stack. It holds major stakes in five of six leading large-model startups, led a $10B DeepSeek round, and backs chipmakers like Enflame. This "borrowed strength" approach—buying expertise rather than building alone—mirrors its mobile-era playbook. The strategy aims to secure full-stack AI capabilities spanning chips, models, and applications, while generating substantial returns as portfolio companies like Zhipu and MiniMax list publicly. However, available targets are shrinking as China's AI startup window narrows.

title: 为了省点 Claude Code 钱，研究到了凌晨 3 点
content: The author spent until 3 a.m. trying to reduce Claude Code costs by building a tool called "dsb" that would delegate file-editing tasks to cheaper local models while keeping Opus for planning. Multiple AI models initially endorsed the idea. After extensive debugging, Claude Code itself concluded the approach wouldn't save tokens—its native edit tools already minimize consumption, while the delegation layer added overhead. The author reflects that tinkering is valuable learning but not worth chronic sleep deprivation, and shares plans to write openly about such experiences in a book called "Refactoring the Self."

title: 我对 Token 的一些理解：它不是“越多越好”，而是“刚刚好”
content: Token efficiency—not raw consumption—determines whether large language model applications can scale sustainably. Unmanaged tokens inflate costs, slow response times, degrade output quality, and destabilize systems as user volume grows. Effective token management requires visibility into per-request usage, identifying waste sources, selecting appropriate models per task, and controlling input length through truncation or summarization. Critical scenarios include AI chatbots, customer service, RAG systems, agent workflows, content generation, and enterprise knowledge bases. Teams should optimize token architecture early rather than reactively addressing cost overruns after deployment.

title: The new HTTP QUERY method explained
content: The HTTP QUERY method is a proposed new HTTP method for making safe, idempotent queries with request bodies. Unlike GET, which has limitations on body usage, QUERY allows complex query parameters to be sent in the body while remaining cacheable and bookmarkable. It addresses practical issues where URLs become too long or sensitive data would be exposed in query strings.

title: 尴尬了，OpenAI刚派GPT-5.5-Cyber修补地球，Codex却爆出致命bug
content: OpenAI released GPT-5.5-Cyber, its most powerful cybersecurity model scoring 85.6% on CyberGym benchmarks, alongside the Codex Security plugin for automated vulnerability detection and patching. The company launched "Patch the Planet" for open-source security and Daybreak partnerships with major security vendors. Simultaneously, developers discovered Codex was writing TRACE logs to a local SQLite file at up to 16MB/s—potentially 640TB annually, enough to exhaust a consumer SSD's lifespan within a year. OpenAI has since released a fix and urged users to upgrade.

title: 又一大模型发布，号称比肩Fable 5和Mythos
content: Japanese AI unicorn Sakana AI released the Sakana Fugu series of orchestration models, including Fugu and Fugu Ultra. Unlike traditional language models, Fugu does not answer questions itself but acts as a "commander" that selects and dispatches optimal specialized models to complete tasks. Tests show Fugu Ultra matches or exceeds top models like Fable 5 and Mythos Preview across engineering, science, and reasoning benchmarks. The approach emphasizes "collective intelligence" and modularity, allowing users to customize model pools based on cost, privacy, and compliance needs, while reducing dependence on single suppliers for AI sovereignty.

title: 1.2万亿，清华教授，挑战美国最强AI，一战封神
content: Zhipu AI's market value surged to 1.2 trillion HKD after its GLM-5.2 model ranked second globally on the Code Arena benchmark, following the U.S. ban on Fable 5. The model marks China's first entry into the top tier of coding-capable AI systems. Chief scientist Tang Jie, a Tsinghua professor, steered Zhipu toward coding rather than chat-based AI, viewing task execution as the path to AGI. His earlier bets included China's first open-source 100-billion-parameter model in 2022, trained at one-fifth of OpenAI's cost. Tang spent 13 years building the academic tool AMiner before founding Zhipu in 2019.

title: 一门贩卖“全球排名”的暴利生意，精准收割中产的钱包与肉体
content:
HYROX, a German-founded fitness race combining 8km running with functional exercises, has rapidly grown in China since 2022, attracting over 10,000 participants at its 2026 Shanghai event. The business model generates substantial revenue through entry fees (638-798 yuan per person), audience tickets, gym licensing fees (~1.1 million yuan annually from 500 partner gyms), and official photography. Despite simple, easily replicable exercises, HYROX monetizes "global ranking" prestige that appeals to middle-class professionals seeking measurable achievement.

However, participants bear significant costs: training classes at 109-199 yuan each, travel expenses, and injury risks from high-intensity workouts. Partner gyms face heavy equipment investments (150,000-300,000 yuan) and slow returns while handling marketing and education costs. The article suggests this premium model may face declining appeal as novelty wears off.

content: Huawei announced it will provide insurance coverage for its Qiankun ADS Max advanced driving system starting July 1. The one-time purchase price will increase from 32,000 to 36,000 yuan, with subsidized costs rising from 12,000 to 15,000 yuan. Huawei becomes the second company after BYD to offer such guarantees for intelligent driving.

title: 古尔曼：过去十年苹果设计部门地位持续下滑，新 CEO 特纳斯将做出改变
content: Under Tim Cook, Apple's design team lost influence at the executive level, with Jony Ive's departure and the rise of finance and operations in product decisions. Design leadership disappeared from the senior executive roster. Incoming CEO John Ternus plans to reverse this trend, restore design's decision-making authority, and deepen his involvement in product development. He has spent considerable time with the industrial design team and will defend Apple's design quality. His first major public appearance will be this fall's product launch featuring a new foldable iPhone.

title: 微软 CEO 呼吁打破 AI 巨头垄断 转向廉价模型、强化用户选择权

He argues businesses and consumers should select among various AI systems rather than relying on a few dominant suppliers, while emphasizing the need to build public trust in AI.

title: 豆包 App 灰测打车功能，由曹操出行提供服务

Drivers receive an extra 2-yuan service fee for Doubao orders. Separately, Cao Cao Mobility announced its RoboX strategy to deploy 100,000 Robotaxis and 100,000 Robovans by 2030, launched an AI division, and is restructuring around AI transformation.

content: A Bengal tigress in India's Kumaon region killed 436 people between 1900-1907, earning a Guinness record. In 1907, nearly 300 hunters surrounded the man-eater using blood trails from her final victim, a 16-year-old girl. The tiger's dental examination revealed broken canines and damaged molars from a previous gunshot wound, preventing her from hunting natural prey and forcing her to target slower humans she had learned to stalk.

title: 智谱万亿了，DeepSeek还会远吗？
content: Chinese AI firm Zhipu reached a HK$1.1 trillion market cap with 1,900% gains this year, despite 2025 revenue of only ¥724 million and net losses of ¥4.7 billion. The valuation surge reflects global AI hype, scarce pure-play large language model stocks in Hong Kong, and investor bets on China's AI potential. Competitor DeepSeek recently raised over $7.4 billion at a $50+ billion valuation, while MiniMax pursues dual listings. With major share lock-ups expiring in July and intense volatility, whether Zhipu sustains its valuation depends on proving commercial viability—mirroring Anthropic's path toward profitability through coding tools and enterprise APIs.

title: SpaceX 股价连续三个交易日下跌，市值蒸发逾 6000 亿美元，为何会持续下跌？其未来前景如何？
content: SpaceX's stock fell for three consecutive trading days, wiping out over $600 billion in market value—23% total—to $154.60, its lowest since going public. The decline followed the company's debut investment-grade bond issuance, signaling heavy borrowing to fund AI ambitions. Low float (4.2% of shares tradeable) and strong retail interest have fueled sharp volatility since its record $75 billion IPO. Despite the drop, SpaceX remains the world's sixth-largest company by market cap at slightly above $2 trillion, still ~15% above its $135 offering price.

title: From pledge to practice: Building a more inclusive open source ecosystem
content: GitHub reports progress on its accessibility pledge, which aims to empower disabled contributors, expand assistive technology, and improve mainstream open source accessibility. Key 2025-2026 initiatives include an assistive technology hackathon in San Francisco with 124 attendees and 25+ projects, plus the first Open Source Accessibility Summit in Raleigh with 100 attendees. GitHub launched practical tools including an accessibility scanner, annotation toolkit, documentation, and best practices guide. Upcoming events include the virtual Community Day on July 9, 2026 and the second Summit on October 19, 2026 in Raleigh.
